items.blinded_text: This market will resolve to “Yes” if Donald Person A or the Entity A announces a reduction, removal, or suspension of any existing tariffs on Federation A between market creation and relative-date-1 , specified-time ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”. Only tariff reductions specifically announced in relation to Federation A, goods from Federation A, or a specific set of countries including Federation A will qualify. For example, an announced reduction in global tariffs will not count toward this market’s resolution. Only definitive announcements qualify. Suggestions, negotiations, expressions of openness, or other non-definitive statements will not qualify. Tariff reductions, removals, or suspensions announced as part of a mutual agreement or deal between the Federation B and Federation A will qualify. Any qualifying action announced within this market’s time frame will count, regardless of whether or when the tariff reduction, removal, or suspension goes into effect. This market’s primary resolution source will be official information from the Entity A; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Will Person A announce a tariff reduction on Federation A?
